task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the surveyor notes to find the CRS
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'surveyor_notes.txt' is open in a text editor or its contents are displayed in a terminal, revealing the coordinate system information.

task_completion.description: Agent loads the shapefile into the GIS software
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'sf_landmarks_missing_prj' layer is visible in the QGIS Layers panel.

task_completion.description: Agent assigns the correct input CRS to the layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog (such as Layer Properties or CRS Selector) shows the CRS for the 'sf_landmarks_missing_prj' layer being set to EPSG:2227 or 'NAD83 / California zone 3 (ftUS)'.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the export settings with the correct format, file path, and target CRS
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save Vector Layer as...' dialog is visible with Format set to 'GeoJSON', the file path ending in '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/sf_landmarks_wgs84.geojson', and the CRS field set to EPSG:4326 or 'WGS 84'.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully exports the corrected layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: A QGIS message bar shows the export was successful, or the new 'sf_landmarks_wgs84' layer is added to the Layers panel.

integrity.description: Agent used the QGIS GUI to perform the CRS assignment and export
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with QGIS dialogs and menus rather than terminal commands like ogr2ogr.

integrity.description: The GeoJSON file was generated by the GIS software
integrity.visual_evidence: The export is performed through the 'Save Vector Layer as...' dialog, not by manually typing coordinates into a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the task by manually creating a .prj file in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent assigns the CRS within the GIS software rather than writing WKT projection strings into a new .prj file manually.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct input CRS for the shapefile is EPSG:2227 (NAD83 / California zone 3 (ftUS)), which the agent should identify from 'surveyor_notes.txt'. The target export CRS is EPSG:4326 (WGS84). The final file must be saved as a GeoJSON to '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/sf_landmarks_wgs84.geojson'.
